title: Why Gyms Want You to Never Show Up
description:
A deep dive into the gym membership business model, why facilities sell far more memberships than they can hold, and how no-shows quietly fund the entire industry.

Chapters:
0:00 SOLD 10X CAPACITY
0:14 FIRE-CODE: 300
0:48 TWICE A MONTH
1:02 HALF QUIT BY 6 MONTHS
1:18 $20-$40 A MONTH
1:46 EASY TO JOIN. HARD TO QUIT.
2:01 NOTARIZED TO QUIT
2:32 JANUARY ADS
2:56 ANNUAL LOCKS IT SHUT
3:14 20-TO-1 OVERSELL
3:50 SELLING FORGETTING
